explanation: The user instructs to clean the pot in the sink. The robot is currently holding pot_1. To clean it, the pot must first be placed in the sink basin. Then, the faucet should be turned on and off to ensure the sink is ready. Afterward, the pot is picked up again and poured into the sink basin to remove the contents. Finally, the pot is placed back on the countertop. This sequence ensures the pot is properly cleaned and returned to its original location.
